email.charset/Charset/input_charset.name: input_charset
email.charset/Charset/input_charset.description: The initial character set specified. Common aliases are converted to their official email names (e.g. latin_1 is converted to iso-8859-1). Defaults to 7-bit us-ascii.

info.excerpt: The initial character set specified. Common aliases are converted to their official email names (e.g. latin_1 is converted to iso-8859-1). Defaults to 7-bit us-ascii.

email.charset/Charset/input_codec.name: input_codec
email.charset/Charset/input_codec.description: The name of the Python codec used to convert the input_charset to Unicode. If no conversion codec is necessary, this attribute will be None.

info.excerpt: The name of the Python codec used to convert the input_charset to Unicode. If no conversion codec is necessary, this attribute will be None.
